item.title: Routing latency incident
item.description:
Jul 6, 06:45 UTC
RESOLVED - The incident has been resolved and routing latency is back to normal.

Jul 6, 06:10 UTC
MONITORING - A fix has been applied and we are monitoring the results.

Jul 6, 05:30 UTC
INVESTIGATING - We are investigating increased routing latency.

item.title: Scheduled Database Maintenance
item.description:
Jul 5, 6:30 AM UTC
COMPLETED - Scheduled maintenance has been completed.
